description_long: This is a pair of low-top, casual sneakers with a predominantly black upper and a contrasting light brown rubber sole. The shoes feature a standard lace-up design with black laces and subtle stitching details along the sides and around the toe box. The heel area displays a white printed logo and the word 'Amborius', along with a decorative graphic. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, dark material for comfort. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic fabric and rubber, typical for urban streetwear. The shoes are clean, well-structured, and show no visible signs of wear.
description: A pair of black low-top sneakers with light brown soles, black laces, and white branding on the heel. The shoes are clean and appear new, with subtle stitching and a comfortable, casual design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe boxes, black laces, and the clean, smooth upper surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile, stitching details, and the contrast between the black upper and brown sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white 'Amborius' branding and decorative logo on the heel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lateral stitching, lace area, and the full length of the brown sole.
attribute_logo: White graphic and 'Amborius' text on the heel counter of each shoe
